description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a modern design, featuring a wood-textured frame and a combination of open shelves and a closed compartment. The upper section consists of three open shelves, ideal for displaying books, decor, or small items. The lower section is a closed cabinet with a smooth, light-colored door, providing concealed storage. The cabinet stands on four short, angled legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance and a mid-century modern aesthetic. The sides and top are finished in a wood grain pattern, while the front door contrasts with a lighter, solid color. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or residential spaces.
description: A tall, narrow shelving unit with three open shelves and a lower closed cabinet, featuring a wood-textured frame and angled legs. The design combines open display and concealed storage with a modern, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed cabinet door and the unit's narrow profile.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open shelves and the closed cabinet at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain texture and depth.
